overall.description: Nighttime walk along a Los Santos city street in GTA V, featuring the iconic Banner Donuts landmark. The scene showcases wet pavement reflecting streetlights, palm trees lining the sidewalk, and commercial buildings with closed shutters under a dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with illuminated donut shop landmark

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past the Banner Donuts shop and palm trees

entered.detail: large circular illuminated sign with 'BANNER DONUTS' text on building roof
tall palm tree trunk at sidewalk edge with textured bark
two-story commercial building with closed metal shutters and 'APARTMENT' signage
red illuminated vertical sign visible in the distance down the street
tall street light illuminating the wet pavement below

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a nighttime urban street in Los Santos, with the iconic Banner Donuts sign glowing prominently on the left. The camera walks forward along a concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees, passing a two-story apartment building with closed shutters on the right. Streetlights cast cool reflections on the wet pavement while sparse traffic moves in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching street intersection with traffic signals

events.description: passing the Banner Donuts shop, view opens toward the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk toward the intersection, moving past the palm trees

entered.detail: road intersection with traffic lights and crosswalk markings becoming visible ahead

segments.scene_description: Moving past the donut shop, the camera continues walking as the palm trees recede to the left rear. The apartment building remains on the right while the view opens toward a street intersection ahead, with traffic lights and distant vehicle headlights visible. The wet sidewalk continues reflecting the urban night lighting as the approach to the crosswalk begins.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a nighttime urban street that transitions from a focused view of a commercial landmark toward an open city intersection. It begins on a concrete sidewalk where the glowing Banner Donuts sign dominates the left side and a shuttered two-story apartment building lines the right. As the camera advances, the palm trees recede into the background while cool streetlight reflections shimmer across the wet pavement. The scene then opens up as the donut shop is left behind, shifting the perspective toward a distant crosswalk. Finally, the view expands to reveal a street intersection marked by traffic lights and the glow of oncoming vehicle headlights.
